citation: Gichoya JW, Banerjee I, Bhimireddy AR, et al. AI recognition of patient race in medical imaging. Lancet Digit Health. 2022;4(6):e406-e414.
case_summary: Demonstrated that medical imaging models can infer race at high AUC, creating major fairness and leakage concerns.
